newsSince: Record Q1 2026 consolidated revenue on enterprise/data-center power demand, but management flagged muted near-term profit from product-mix shifts and delayed high-power shipments. The OmniOn/Kinpo AI-power-supply tie-up (reported ~May 12) supports the AI-power positioning but largely predates June 9; the recent price action is theme-driven, not fresh fundamentals.

sources.label: AcBel teams with OmniOn and Kinpo for AI power-supply market (DIGITIMES)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: the hidden-gem premise keeps eroding as the AI-power story becomes consensus (limit-up, retail coverage, OmniOn/Kinpo JV already public). Record Q1 revenue is offset by muted margins and delayed high-power shipments, so no new fundamental edge since June 9; hold after the prior down-move.
verdicts.bull: Server/high-density power supplier with OmniOn IP and Kinpo scale aimed at AI data-center power.
verdicts.neutral: Top-line AI demand real, but margin/mix and shipment timing cap the alpha.
verdicts.bear: Crowded theme trade; 40% YTD with delayed high-power shipments leaves earnings risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: High-power AI rack PSU/PDU shipments converting to margin
verdicts.primaryRisk: Margin compression and slipping high-power shipment timing
